channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: APOE2 may protect the brain from Alzheimer’s and aging
item.description: The longevity-linked APOE2 gene appears to protect brain cells by reducing DNA damage and helping neurons recover from stress. The finding could open ...

item.title: AI helps Stanford scientists discover “natural Ozempic” without the usual side effects
item.description: Stanford Medicine researchers have discovered a naturally occurring molecule that may suppress appetite and reduce body weight much like Ozempic, but ...

item.title: Sweden’s hidden rare earth deposits could help break China’s grip
item.description: Sweden could become an important source of rare earth elements needed for magnets and green technologies. Instead of extracting one target metal, rese...

item.title: China’s Tianwen-1 captures interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS near Mars
item.description: China’s Tianwen-1 orbiter captured a faint but remarkable view of 3I/ATLAS as the interstellar comet raced past Mars. The images reveal its tail and g...
